chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1500 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 10.11.2025 *** None present on behalf of the petitioners. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, which prima facie reflects lack of interest on part of the petitioners. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
